title: Section 27
content: All marriages hereafter solemnized in 1[India] between persons one or both of whom professes or profess the Christian religion, except marriages solemnized under Part V or Part VI of this Act, shall be registered in manner hereinafter prescribed.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and Sch., for "a Part A State or a Part C State".
